notes.heading: Runs the server once after install
notes.body: After SteamCMD finishes and the server executable is detected, the app can launch Dragonwilds once so the game can create DedicatedServer.ini.

notes.heading: 10-second close prompt
notes.body: The app waits 10 seconds, then tells you to close the server console so the generated config can be patched safely.

notes.heading: Setup waits for a config source
notes.body: The Owner ID and password setup prompt stays hidden until DedicatedServer.ini or an official template actually exists.
